CustomField.description: Determines execution sequence relative to other actions on the same object and event. Lower numbers execute first. Actions sharing the same order value have no guaranteed sequence. Subscriber-controlled to allow reordering without package upgrades.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Lower numbers run first within the same object and event. Use gaps (10, 20, 30) so new actions can be inserted between existing ones without renumbering.
CustomField.label: Order
